# VFMStitch — pip dependency index (autogenerated from author conda envs)
#
# This project is split across two recommended environments (see README).
# Do NOT `pip install` both lockfiles into the same environment without reconciling
# Python and PyTorch/CUDA versions.
#
# Preprocessing, NIfTI, and point cloud (env name used by author: gen_env):
#   pip install -r requirements-gen_env.txt
#
# DINOv3 feature extraction (env name used by author: dinov3):
#   pip install -r requirements-dinov3.txt
#
# DINOv3 model code and weights are installed separately from the official DINOv3
# repository (not covered by these files).
